title: Better Ore Progression
body:
**Disclaimer: by The name I don't mean It's realy Better. I mean only for me is Better but for you maybe not and it's my first mod so feel free to Comment What could I add!!! **


This Mod makes defefrence in the Ore ProgrssionSystem of Minecraft by that I mean it makes that some Ores are added use now like new Tools and Equipment. Here are the
[GitHub Sources](https://github.com/DLMSpielt/BetterOreProgression) if You wanna Help or see the Code.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

> New Ores:
- Enderite is better then Netherite but it's hardder to get, needs diamond pickaxe to mine
- End Crystals needed to craft Enderite
- Blue Gold better Then Iron it's needed to mine diamonds it's Craft by 1 Iron Ingot and 1 Gold Ingot
>New Tools and Equipment Types:
- Copper, Blue Gold, Enderite
- You need to make Copper Pickaxe to mine Iron
>New Items and blocks:
- Enderite Armor / Tools
- Enderite Ingot
- Enderite Piece
- Enderite Upgrade Smithing Template found in End Cities
- Enderite Block/ Ore
- End Crystal
- End Crystal Block/ Ore
- Blue Gold Ingot
- Blue Gold Block
- Blue Gold Armor / Tools
- Copper Armor / Tools
